channel.title: Shanghai Weather Forecast
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Shanghai via QWeather.

item.title: 2026-03-09: Cloudy, 4°C - 12°C
item.description:
Condition (Day): Cloudy (Icon: 101)
Condition (Night): Clear (Icon: 150)
Temperature: 4°C to 12°C
Precipitation: 0.0 mm
Cloud Cover: 1%

Wind (Day): N (0°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h
Wind (Night): N (0°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h

Humidity: 71%
Visibility: 25 km
Sun: Rise 06:13, Set 17:58
Moon: Rise 23:40, Set 09:08 (Phase: Waning gibbous,805)
UV Index: 6
